content.problemStatement:
Chef has a permutationpermutationpermutation P1,P2,…,PNP_1, P_2, \ldots, P_NP1​,P2​,…,PN​ of integers 111 through NNN. He needs you to find the value of the sum
S=∑i=1N∑j=iNgetMin (i,j)  ∧  getMax (i,j) ,S = \sum\limits_{i=1}^{N} \sum\limits_{j=i}^{N} \mathrm{getMin}\,(i, j) \; \wedge \; \mathrm{getMax}\,(i, j) \,,S=i=1∑N​j=i∑N​getMin(i,j)∧getMax(i,j),
where ∧\wedge∧ denotes the bitwise AND operation and
getMin (i,j)=min (Pi,Pi+1,…,Pj−1,Pj) ,\mathrm{getMin}\,(i, j) = \mathrm{min}\,(P_i, P_{i+1}, \ldots, P_{j-1}, P_j) \,,getMin(i,j)=min(Pi​,Pi+1​,…,Pj−1​,Pj​),
getMax (i,j)=max (Pi,Pi+1,…,Pj−1,Pj) .\mathrm{getMax}\,(i, j) = \mathrm{max}\,(P_i, P_{i+1}, \ldots, P_{j-1}, P_j) \,.getMax(i,j)=max(Pi​,Pi+1​,…,Pj−1​,Pj​).
constraints: 1≤Pi≤N1 \le P_i \le N1≤Pi​≤N for each valid iii
P1,P2,…,PNP_1, P_2, \ldots, P_NP1​,P2​,…,PN​ is a permutation
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers P1,P2,…,PNP_1, P_2, \ldots, P_NP1​,P2​,…,PN​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer SSS.
